# PlayMediaIntentHandlingInvocationResponse

**Type**

The service’s response to a request to process a play media intent.

## Declaration

```swift
* PlayMediaIntentHandlingInvocationResponse
```

## Discussion

Allowed types: [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingResolveMediaItemsInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingResolvePlayShuffledInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingResolvePlaybackQueueLocationInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingResolvePlaybackRepeatModeInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingResolveResumePlaybackInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/PlayMediaIntentHandlingHandleInvocationResponse], [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/ProtocolExceptionInvocationResponse]

## Processing a Play Media Intent

- **PlayMediaIntent**: An object that describes the user’s request to play a media item.
- **PlayMediaIntentHandlingInvocation**: A request to process a play media intent.
